THE_ARCHITECT.talk.ASTROLUPINE-AstroLupi: Adapting to environment... Unknown dimension. Objective: survive and hunt.
A creation of interwoven flesh and metal. Climb on, little wolf.
Will your neural implants break under the Spire's pressure?
Adrenaline pumps functioning nominally. My will remains stable.
NEOW.talk.ASTROLUPINE-AstroLupine_Charac: Steel and... flesh... awakening here... as well......
Pain inhibitors injected. Ready to deploy.
DARV.talk.ASTROLUPINE-AstroLupine_Charac: Hey! Those metal parts on ya look real snappy! Want me to give 'em a few whacks?
Careful, don't damage my neural interfaces.
OROBAS.talk.ASTROLUPINE-AstroLupine_Char: A beast of flesh and machine...... Do you understand the darkness within this Spire?
My cybernetic eyes can pierce any shadow.
PAEL.talk.ASTROLUPINE-AstroLupine_Charac: In this ruined place, your body gleams with a different kind of light.
That's because my exoskeleton was recently polished.
TEZCATARA.talk.ASTROLUPINE-AstroLupine_C: What a delicate killing tool! Let me see if it's blood or motor oil flowing through your tubes!
Do you want a taste of a high-voltage energy blade?
TANX.talk.ASTROLUPINE-AstroLupine_Charac: Whoa, a wolf studded with metal? Do you eat meat or drink motor oil?
VAKUU.talk.ASTROLUPINE-AstroLupine_Chara: ......Is your soul imprisoned within those cables?
NONUPEIPE.talk.ASTROLUPINE-AstroLupine_C: The echoes of the Spire resonate in your auditory implants, don't they?
Auditory enhancement modules have filtered out that annoying noise.
